name: Microwave Oatmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a large container, such as a quart size glass measuring bowl or larger, to prevent boiling and overflow.
2. Combine the steel cut oatmeal, water, and dried fruit (if using) in the microwave-safe container.
3. Heat for 10 minutes at 80% power. Adjust power percentage and time if your microwave is less powerful, as it may boil over at higher settings.
4. Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking.
5. Once cooked, allow the oatmeal to cool slightly before serving.
